# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

services:
  - name: my_service
    host: your_service_host
    port: your_service_port
    path: your_service_path
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://your_web_app
          methods: 
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          headers: 
            - Accept
            - Content-Type
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          minute: 10
          hour: 500

routes:
  - name: my_route
    paths:
      - "/your_route_path"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: 
            - http://your_web_app
          methods: 
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          headers: 
            - Accept
            - Content-Type
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          minute: 20
          hour: 1000

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: 
        - http://your_web_app
      methods: 
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers: 
        - Accept
        - Content-Type
  - name: key-auth
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 30
      minute: 60
      hour: 3000
